title: Calculators, About page and share images
items: New Calculators section: length, weight, temperature, area, speed and data-size converters plus percentage, age, EMI, GST and BMI calculators
Ctrl+K now focuses the tool search from any page
Every tool page has a proper share preview image and a suggest-a-feature link
New About page explaining exactly how the privacy model works

title: Sign PDF and friends
items: Sign PDF: draw your signature, type your name in a handwriting style, or upload a photo of your real signature, then place it on any page
Compress PDF can now target an exact size in KB
Rotate PDF: 90, 180 or 270 degrees, all pages or a range
Currency converter with 160+ currencies at daily rates
Image Converter got smart format suggestions and a split-by-size batch rule

title: Text tools and FAQs
items: New Text section: word counter, case converter, sort and dedupe lines, lorem ipsum and slug generator
UUID, password and QR code generators under Dev Tools
Frequently-asked-questions section on every tool page
Wider layout and clearer wording: files stay on your device
Markdown preview rewritten: proper GitHub-style rendering with independent scrolling panes

title: The big restructure
items: One page per tool, 27 tools across Images, PDF and Dev Tools
Site-wide search, dark and light themes, offline support
Every tool runs fully in the browser, nothing is uploaded
